source.scope: Official-source-backed Jersey year-of-assessment 2026 standard and marginal-relief individual income tax.

JE.notes: Lower of the 20% standard calculation and 26% marginal-relief calculation using caller-confirmed post-deduction liable income and total exemption threshold. Relief eligibility and deductions remain outside scope.

register.coverageSummary: Year-of-assessment 2026 independent individual income tax using the lower standard or marginal-relief calculation.
